=====

.. autoapisummary::

Module Contents

.. py:class:: ddgep(x_train, y_train, n_order, n_bases, der_indices, rays, sigma_n=0.0, nugget=1e-06, kernel='SE', kernel_type='anisotropic')

   .. py:attribute:: x_train


   .. py:attribute:: y_train


   .. py:attribute:: sigma_n
      :value: 0.0



   .. py:attribute:: nugget
      :value: 1e-06



   .. py:attribute:: n_order


   .. py:attribute:: n_bases


   .. py:attribute:: rays


   .. py:attribute:: n_rays


   .. py:attribute:: dim


   .. py:attribute:: kernel
      :value: 'SE'



   .. py:attribute:: kernel_type
      :value: 'anisotropic'



   .. py:attribute:: der_indices


   .. py:attribute:: kernel_func


   .. py:attribute:: kernel_factory


   .. py:attribute:: bounds
      :value: []



   .. py:attribute:: optimizer


   .. py:method:: se_kernel_anisotropic(X1, X2, length_scales, n_order, index)


   .. py:method:: rq_kernel_anisotropic(X1, X2, length_scales, n_order, index)


   .. py:method:: sine_exp_kernel_anisotropic(X1, X2, length_scales, n_order, index)


   .. py:method:: se_kernel_isotropic(X1, X2, length_scales, n_order, index)


   .. py:method:: rq_kernel_isotropic(X1, X2, length_scales, n_order, index)


   .. py:method:: sine_exp_kernel_isotropic(X1, X2, length_scales, n_order, index)


   .. py:method:: negative_log_marginal_likelihood(ell, x_train, sigma_n, n_order, n_bases, der_indices)

      
      NLL for standard GP in multiple dimensions.

      NLL = 0.5 * y^T (K^-1) y + 0.5 * log|K| + 0.5*N*log(2*pi).















      ..
          !! processed by numpydoc !!


   .. py:method:: optimize_hyperparameters()


   .. py:method:: predict(X_test, length_scales, calc_cov=False, return_deriv=False)

      
      Compute posterior predictive mean and covariance at X_test
      under an ARD RBF kernel with given length_scales.
















      ..
          !! processed by numpydoc !!
